name: Basque Shepherd's Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8-inch skillet, cook bacon until crisp; drain and reserve 2 tbsp drippings.
2. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, combine reserved drippings, peeled, thinly sliced potatoes, onions, parsley, salt, thyme, and pepper.
4. Cover tightly and cook over low heat for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring carefully once or twice.
5. In a small bowl, beat together eggs and milk; pour over the potato mixture.
6. Cover and continue cooking over very low heat for 8 to 10 minutes until the egg is set in the center.
7. Using a wide spatula, loosen the sides and bottom of the skillet. Slide the potatoes out onto a serving plate or serve from the skillet.
8. Sprinkle crumbled bacon on top and serve hot.
